hero.subtitle: A precision 3D-printed accessory with passive NFC capabilities. No battery, no charging, just magic.

latency.sub: Snappy, reliable connection on every tap.

product.name: Clover NFC Keychain
product.msrpNote: Demo pricing · not a live checkout

green.label: Signature Green
green.tagline: The original Clover tone — balanced for everyday carry.
green.storyBody: Our signature Clover Green embodies growth and calm confidence. Crafted to blend with natural materials while staying distinct on desks and in pockets—a quiet nod to luck without shouting for attention.
green.highlight1: Premium matte finish with a vapor-honed rim
green.highlight2: Seamlessly complements earth tones and dark hardware
green.highlight3: Our most requested finish for everyday carry

blue.label: Arctic Blue
blue.tagline: A crisp, cool accent for minimalist workspaces.
blue.storyBody: Arctic Blue is for those who prefer their tools precise and legible. Every NFC tap feels intentional, smoothly bridging the gap between physical touch and digital action.
blue.highlight2: Vibrant clarity under both natural and studio lighting
blue.highlight3: Perfect for triggering focus modes and productivity shortcuts

red.label: Crimson Red
red.storyBody: Crimson Red refuses to be background furniture. It is the color you choose when you want your tech to make a statement, combining striking aesthetics with effortless smart-device interaction.
red.highlight1: Vibrant accent color for dynamic creative studios
red.highlight2: Ideal for triggering 'Do Not Disturb' or deep work states
red.highlight3: Finished with a subtle, premium pearlescent topcoat

purple.label: Lavender
purple.tagline: A subtle, tech-forward hue with creative energy.
purple.storyBody: Lavender carries creative energy without theatrics. It is a sophisticated, modern shade designed for digital artists and creators who want their physical tools to reflect their imagination.
purple.highlight1: Rich saturation that pops against dark accessories
purple.highlight2: Popular for mapping to creative apps and music playlists
purple.highlight3: Pairs elegantly with silver or graphite aesthetics

black.label: Obsidian Black
black.storyBody: Obsidian Black disappears into your everyday carry until the rim catches the light. No visual noise—just pure function and minimalist form operating in perfect balance.
black.highlight1: Deep matte slate paired with a sharp white rim
black.highlight2: Ultra-low reflectance for a true stealth profile
black.highlight3: The ultimate addition to any monochrome EDC setup

yellow.label: Honey Yellow
yellow.storyBody: Honey Yellow is generous and optimistic. It is the finish you pick when your setup could use a little more energy, making every digital interaction feel vibrant and alive.
yellow.highlight1: High-visibility design, perfect for dark bags or deep pockets
yellow.highlight2: An energetic pop of color for modern workspaces
yellow.highlight3: Complements warm lighting, brass, and walnut textures

values.ingress: 100% waterproof — NFC chip sealed inside 3D printed body

tapDemo.subtitle: Interaction
tapDemo.description: Clover seamlessly blends precision 3D-printed design with embedded NFC technology. No app required—just a simple, physical touch to connect the physical and digital worlds.
tapDemo.hint: Drag keychain or click button to scan

steps.step1Desc: Attach it to your keyring, backpack, or lanyard. Precision 3D-printed for a lightweight yet highly durable finish that easily handles the bumps and scrapes of daily wear.
steps.step2Desc: Bring the Clover close to the NFC reader on any modern smartphone to instantly wake and trigger the embedded smart chip.
steps.step3Desc: Instantly share your contact card, launch custom automated workflows, trigger smart home profiles, or open direct website links.

faq.subtitle: Support
faq.title: Common Questions.
faq.a1: No app required. Clover uses the built-in NFC technology that comes standard on all modern smartphones. Just tap and go.
faq.q2: What can I write to the tag?
faq.a2: You can write anything the NTAG216 chip supports: website URLs, Wi-Fi passwords, digital business cards (vCard), or custom smart home automation triggers.
faq.a3: Since every Clover is precision 3D-printed individually, you might notice very slight, unique variations in the surface finish that make your keychain one-of-a-kind.
faq.q4: Will it work through a phone case?
faq.a4: Yes, Clover works perfectly through most standard phone cases. Only extremely thick cases or metal wallets might interfere with the NFC signal.

footer.description: Redefining everyday carry with minimal design and interactive technology. Luck you can wear and tap.
